text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Hey, good evening. My name is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Florida State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet?" "I don't know if $300 is enough, so groceries has gotten so expensive. That's like one run at Publix." "Well, I really want to help you get this taken care of as these benefits are time sensitive. So you do have Medicare Part A and B, right?" "Really, I do. I'm only 20 years old, though." "Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day." "Then why are you calling me and with the your.
